message:
fix: compile + clippy blockers, diff audit batch 384 — 20 files, all SOUND

Compile fixes:
- decoding.rs: test used wrong EncodingConfig type (distributed vs config)
- decoding.rs: num_blocks cast widened from u8 to u16 for 256-block boundary
- worker_channel.rs: clippy merged identical BootstrapReady/BootstrapFailed arms
- browser.rs: clippy replaced redundant closure with method reference

Includes agent changes (all audited SOUND in batch 384):
- worker_channel.rs: BootstrapFailed now carries worker_id for session identity,
  Queued→CancelRequested and CancelRequested→Completed transitions added
- browser.rs: oneshot disarm-after-delivery semantics for browser reactor
- decoding.rs: 256-block boundary test

Audit batch 384: 20 files across HEAD~6 commits and working tree, all SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
